home.title: Chandra Daya Investasi
home.description: PT Chandra Daya Investasi Tbk (CDI Group) is an infrastructure investment arm of Chandra Asri Group, a leading chemical and energy solutions provider in Southeast Asia, and EGCO, a holding company focused on power business investments in Thailand. CDI Group's diverse operations encompass water supply and treatment, energy, port & storage, and logistics.
